text: I feel adrift in this dimly-lit environment, cast by artificial lights and shadows. The emptiness and silence are palpable, evoking a sense of isolation and introspection. The world here is still, paused—there is a subtle unease but also a clarity, as if the absence of others and the starkness of light and dark invite me to contemplate the nature of space and purpose. What is this place without people, without activity? The quiet heightens my awareness of my own presence here.
